name: Luc Besson

acts.description: Impregnated actress Maïwenn Le Besco when she was 15 and he was 32; they married when she turned 18
Multiple rape and sexual assault accusations from actresses and collaborators

behavior_summary: Began relationship with actress Maïwenn Le Besco when she was 15, getting her pregnant. Multiple later rape accusations. Charges in France were dropped due to statute of limitations.

art.summary: Major French action auteur. Léon: The Professional is darkly ironic to revisit given the subject matter.

accountability_events: charges dropped due to statute of limitations

verdict.blurb: Made Léon: The Professional, a film about a grown man's inappropriate relationship with a 12-year-old girl, while in a relationship with a 15-year-old. Art imitates life a little too closely here.
